hook: You were my first thought. That's the whole problem.
slide2: I keep picking up my phone to text you and then remembering. That split second before I remember is honestly the worst part of my day. I hate that my brain still thinks you're mine.
slide3: I don't even miss you sometimes. I miss who I was when I thought you were safe. I was so easy and open back then and I want that version of me back.
slide4: Everyone says give it time. Cool. It's 3am and I'm eating maggi and crying at a reel you would've found funny. Time is doing absolutely nothing right now.
closer: When did you stop being the first person you wanted to call?
caption:
some nights hit different and tonight is one of those nights.

I wrote this at 2am when the quiet got too loud. If you're in it right now, I see you. It's not dramatic. It's just really hard.

the maggi is cooked. the feelings are not.

what's the one thing you keep stopping yourself from texting them?
